EventText: You have arrived at the emergency rendezvous point, having survived a particularly gruelling battle with the empire. Many of the warning indicators and alarms are flasing on the control panels.[br]
You look out of viewport into the cold dead of space. Not a single alliance vessel has made it.[br]

Outcomes.OutcomeText: [br]The ship has been repaired. You conduct a wider sensor scan but still detect nothing. The cold hard realisation sets in. You're all that's left. You must make it back.[br]

EventText: As you jump into this beacon a small space station orbiting a moon hails you.
Our long range sensors detected a large battle with the empire. We're preparing for them. This is our home we will not give it up.
We don't have much to offer you, but we can refuel you and give you some parts. Better than it falling into the hands of the empire if we fall

Outcomes.OutcomeText: [br]A shuttle with a haggard tired crew dock and give you a small stash of supplies

DialogueChoices.OptionText: You can do better than that.....

Outcomes.OutcomeText: [br]A shuttle with a haggard tired crew dock and give you a small stash of supplies, they look very upset with you
[br]They cut comms and ignore your attempts to get them back
